column1: # Tutorial Chapter 1, Lesson 5: arithmetic formulas, @SUM, automatic
# recalculation after a referenced value changes, formula copy with
# relative references, and using a range name in a formula.
# Unsupported tutorial subflows intentionally not covered here:
# formula entry by pointer-splicing the range argument.
# Net Sales figures B5..E5, used later by QTRLY_NETSALES.
# Q1 Costs and Expenses in B8..B12.
# Q2 Costs and Expenses in C8..C12.
# B14 totals Q1 with an explicit arithmetic formula.
# Changing B10 recalculates B14, then changing it back restores the
# C14 totals Q2 with Lotus @SUM and the .. range separator.
# Copy C14 to D14..F14. Copied formulas should shift relative
# references to D8..D12, E8..E12, and F8..F12.
# Create QTRLY_NETSALES over B5..E5 by typing the range address, then
# F5 GOTO + F3 NAMES can jump to the named range's first cell.
ASSERT_PANEL_L3   Enter address to go to
